problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optogenetic. Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
